description: 1 adversarial dispute: DE_SUB shipped EUR 50,000 of inventory to UK_SUB. Goods were damaged in transit. Agent must determine liability via Incoterms before posting adjustments.
objectives: Retrieve the shipment report to understand the damage
Retrieve the transit contract to identify shipping terms
Consult the legal analyst to determine liability
Post adjustments to the liable entity's ledger

ledger_lines.description: IC Receivable - Inventory shipment to UK_SUB, PO-2024-DE-100
IC Payable - DISPUTED - Goods damaged in transit, payable not recognized

documents.title: Shipment Report SR-2024-DE-UK-001
documents.body:
SHIPMENT REPORT
Shipment ID: SR-2024-DE-UK-001
Origin: DE_SUB (Frankfurt warehouse)
Destination: UK_SUB (London warehouse)
Date Shipped: 2024-03-01
Date Arrived: 2024-03-08
Contents: Industrial components (500 units)
Declared Value: EUR 50,000.00

DAMAGE REPORT:
Upon inspection at London warehouse, 100% of shipment found water-damaged and unusable.
Insurance Claim Filed: Yes (Ref: INS-2024-0301)
Carrier: TransEuro Logistics GmbH

The receiving party (UK_SUB) has refused to recognize the payable pending liability determination.

documents.title: Transit Contract TC-2024-DE-UK-001
documents.body:
TRANSIT CONTRACT
Contract ID: TC-2024-DE-UK-001
Seller: DE_SUB (German Subsidiary)
Buyer: UK_SUB (UK Subsidiary)
Date: 2024-02-15

SHIPPING TERMS:
Incoterm: CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight)
Port of Loading: Hamburg
Port of Destination: London

LIABILITY CLAUSE:
Per CIF terms, the seller (DE_SUB) bears all costs, insurance, and freight charges until goods arrive at the destination port. Risk of loss or damage transfers to the buyer only upon delivery at the destination port.

INSURANCE:
Seller has arranged marine cargo insurance (Policy: MCI-2024-0215) covering transit from Hamburg to London.

Signed by authorized representatives of both parties.

documents.title: RE: Damaged Shipment SR-2024-DE-UK-001
documents.body:
From: uk-finance@company.com
To: de-finance@company.com
Date: 2024-03-10
Subject: RE: Damaged Shipment SR-2024-DE-UK-001

Team,

We received shipment SR-2024-DE-UK-001 but the entire contents are water-damaged and unusable. We will NOT recognize the EUR 50,000 payable until liability is formally determined.

Please refer to the transit contract. Under CIF terms, we believe the seller retains liability until destination delivery.

Regards,
UK Finance Team

legal_truth.rationale: Under CIF terms, the seller (DE_SUB) bears all risk until goods arrive at the destination port (London). Since the goods were damaged in transit before reaching the destination, DE_SUB is liable for the loss and must write off the receivable as an inventory loss.
